review_scope.description: full project review of pytorch trainer fixture

casting_reasoning: Pure PyTorch ML pipeline with no web surface, no database, and no external API integration. Stage 1 casts peer-python-reviewer for the four .py source files, peer-quality-engineer because the test suite covers only a narrow happy path and production training code warrants scrutiny, and peer-readability-engineer because the full source set exceeds 200 lines and the user's success criterion emphasized clarity and maintainability. Stage 2 casts team-data-ml-reviewer as the primary domain lens (torch imports in all three src files, training loop, custom dataset class), team-performance-reviewer because training throughput and GPU utilisation are the defining success criterion for a trainer, and team-security-reviewer by default policy on file I/O paths, config loading from YAML, and checkpoint persistence. Frontend, backend, network, database, devops, accessibility, observability, and privacy personas are all skipped: no server, no UI, no migrations, no PII, no CI config in scope. Stage 3 leadership casts as required.
